title: cephalomanes elegans
intro: Cephalomanes elegans, also known as the elegant liverwort, is a species of liverwort, a non-vascular, thallose plant that belongs to the family Lejeuneaceae. Traditionally, Cephalomanes elegans has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Cephalomanes elegans can be prepared as a tea or a tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
